name: s4-ledger
description: S4 Ledger — Defense Logistics Blockchain Platform (Monorepo)

scripts.build: npm run build:prod && npm run build:demo
scripts.build:sizes: npm run build && echo '\n=== BUNDLE SIZES ===' && echo '--- prod-app ---' && ls -lhS prod-app/dist/assets/*.js prod-app/dist/assets/*.css 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5, $NF}' && echo '--- demo-app ---' && ls -lhS demo-app/dist/assets/*.js demo-app/dist/assets/*.css 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5, $NF}' && echo '--- GZIP totals ---' && echo "prod-app: $(gzip -c prod-app/dist/assets/*.js prod-app/dist/assets/*.css 2>/dev/null | wc -c | awk '{printf \"%.0fK\", $1/1024}')" && echo "demo-app: $(gzip -c demo-app/dist/assets/*.js demo-app/dist/assets/*.css 2>/dev/null | wc -c | awk '{printf \"%.0fK\", $1/1024}')"
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
